reviews.review_text:
Just finished our second stay at Big4 Point Vernon and loved it, have rebooked again for later this year.
The Manager Craig is awesome, the owners fantastic and the permanent residents are top notch. Nothing is too much trouble. The amenities are older style at the moment BUT are being upgraded. This park is a real Gem, up the road, away from the hustle and bustle of downtown HB, I cannot fault it at all. Keep doing what you're doing guys, you have a guest in me for as long as I can travel!
Good place to park the caravan a little bit out of town.  Dog friendly beach a few minutes walk away. Amenities good
The place needs upgrade of lights. It's at the wrong end of town. Alright  for a night  but not a lot for the  kids.

Most horrendous camping experience we have ever had! We paid for a 3 night stay and left after 1 night! Don’t believe any reviews that say this site is quiet and relaxing! The permanent onsite population’s dogs and the surrounding neighbourhood dogs bark constantly day & night! It was that bad we abandoned our swag and slept in the car with ear plugs and pillows around our heads! Just before first light we packed up and headed back to the Gold Coast. The one member of staff we met was friendly, a few of the permanent residents in the park are like the unofficial management (or they think they are). After speaking with a few other campers they were portraying stories of how rude and demanding some of the permanent residents are which we did witness a couple of times. We were made aware that this was not a Premier Big 4 site when we booked but we thought if it carried the Big 4 brand surely it couldn’t be to bad………..IT WAS! We wasted a lot of time & money on booking & Diesel to get there which is really disappointing, we certainly DO NOT recommend & guarantee under no circumstances we will never stay there again!
Bit pricey

Wouldn’t recommend staying here. It’s nowhere near Hervey Bay itself, which was disappointing. The “games room” is very basic and felt dirty and run down. We also found some of the on-site residents to be quite rude. The laundry facilities were also an issue the washing machine was full of animal hair. It might be worth having a separate washer designated for pet items.

Overall, not a great experience we ended up leaving early.
The room was dusty and dirty. The games room was not functional

Very run down park. Very little space for kids to play. Far away from beach so you definitely need a form of transport to get anywhere. The kids room was very dirty and poorly maintained. This certainly didn't match the standard of park I have come to expect from Big4. We weren't looking for flashy facilities but were hoping for some open space and clean / well maintained shared spaces that felt safe for kids to explore. We were so disappointed on arrival that we left straight away.

Basic, small camp ground which was just what we wanted. Cabins were simple and adequate for what we needed (although we were forever sweeping them due to the dirt paths) and we had to use boogie boards for the bunk railings for the kids. Pool was awesome and had good hours, however when it was dark by 5.30 and no lights around it that was a bit of a safety concern (so we had to either not swim or get a few adults to come with torches to keep an eye on everyone). We went to the office daily to ask if they had light switch for pool lights to be turned on but the office was never manned over the week.
Craig was very welcoming and friendly and would often stop for a chat when around and had organized some awesome Easter activities for everyone which was a hit, however the other few staff we encountered were not as helpful and almost made us seem like an inconvenience in asking for another tea towel, toilet paper or towel for the cabin. It changed the whole mood of the holiday unfortunately.  For being fully booked and a a public holiday during school holidays, we expected to see more staff around to help tidy up the shared facilities or top up anything in the cabins, even just once. The lights in the pool were my biggest concern, and the lack of bed railings on the bunks (mattress was level with the top of the bunk).

Pool table not operational
only 1 gas bottle working in kitchen
kids zone games room dirty

We recently stayed in one of the cabins here for 7 nights as a family of four, and while there were a few positives, overall our experience was disappointing.

When we arrived, we were greeted by a very kind and helpful gentleman who explained he didn’t own the place but helped out. He showed us to our cabin and made us feel genuinely welcome — a great first impression. The cabin itself was basic, but it had everything we needed for a simple family holiday.

Unfortunately, things started to go downhill from there. On our first morning, I went to make a coffee and found the milk in the fridge had expired a month earlier. Not wanting to make a fuss, I went and bought some myself, assuming it would be replaced — it wasn’t.

We were only supplied with one face cloth for the entire family, which the four of us had to share for three days. After that, I asked at the office for fresh towels, and the staff member there was polite and helpful, arranging for the cleaner to bring them. However, when I asked the cleaner if we could have one face cloth each, I was told they were “running low” and that cabins are only serviced after stays longer than 7 days — though we were eventually given four.

On day four, I asked for a clean tea towel, as only one had been provided. The cleaner made it seem like a huge inconvenience, saying she had to walk all the way to get one. When she arrived, I also mentioned we had run out of dishwashing liquid. Her response was unexpectedly rude and confrontational — to the point I felt the need to raise my hands and say “woah” just to calm the situation. She walked away swearing before eventually returning with the dishwashing liquid.

After that interaction, I felt uncomfortable dealing with her again. We later overheard her speaking negatively about us to someone in the office, after previously complaining about management to us. From that point on, we avoided asking for anything further and instead purchased essentials ourselves, including toilet paper.

For a family of four staying 7 nights, we were provided with:

4 towels
1 face cloth (initially)
Expired milk
4 small rubbish bags
1 set of batteries to share between two remotes
3 rolls of toilet paper

No one checked in on us during our stay, and the office was often closed despite advertised hours.

The only real highlight was the pool and kids’ playground, which were great for the children — although they were not lit at night, limiting their use in the evenings.

Sadly, due to the poor service, lack of basic supplies, and especially the uncomfortable interaction with the cleaner, we would not stay here again.
Beautiful spot walking distance to the beach. Staff were all amazing and the park was clean and well kept!

Hervey Bay Big 4 Point Vernon is a fantastic park!😁 Craig was so helpful and friendly from the moment we drove in and his team kept everything spotless and clean!
The Big 4 team arranged fantastic Easter egg hunt (where all the kids got something lol😅) and a massive free sausage sizzle with all the trimmings! It was actually a feast!
The office, pool, camp kitchen, toilets and kids play area were amazing and our grandkids absolutely loved it and we all made lifelong friendships!!💖
We will definetly be coming back, a huge thank you to Craig and his team on a very wonderful stay and a job very well done!
🥰 Ant Shell and Jovi 🐜🐚🐶

We have had a beautiful stay at the Big 4 Hervey Bay with our baby, toddler and dog.
It has been a very relaxing 12 days here.
The park is maintained well, amenities are clean and tidy, the pool is beautiful and refreshing and the location is very peaceful.
Thanks for a great stay.
Courtney Rose & Family

Really enjoyed our stay.
Pool was massive and clean!
Kids zone was definitely a hit for the kids
Staff were all really friendly and just down to earth people. Would stop and have a chat.
Location was perfect for families.
Bathrooms were clean and tidy!
Overall fantastic stay! Definitely visit again.

Office was not available—neither by email nor by phone. We arrived at 3 PM on a Friday. According to the stated office hours, it should have been open at that time, but it wasn’t. We had no opportunity to speak with anyone from Big4 Hervey Bay. No one responded to emails (the email address is not existing at all) and the phone numbers were unreachable. Very poor service—we wouldn’t book again. There was also no information provided about the Wi-Fi password; we only received it thanks to another visitor at the campsite.

Powered/water/slab caravan site. Extended my stay a few times. Great staff, fantastic atmosphere and the best magnesium pool at walk in temp. Ps. Little pool 35°C 😱 Well maintained and current renovations are going to be nothing less than impressive.
I will not hesitate to make this my go to in Hervey Bay

Definitely not Big 4 standard! The pictures on the website are deceiving, as was the location. This park is in the middle of a residential area a few km’s from the hub of Hervey Bay.  The park is mostly permanent residents, and small van sites. It needs a huge revamp. On the positive side, the staff were friendly, and the facilities were very clean.

Perfect classic park. I was made fully aware that this park is not a modern Big 4. This park suited my needs perfectly.  The amenities, pool, games room and camp kitchen were clean and welcoming.  Craig is a true legend 🙌.  He helped me reverse my caravan onto site in the rain with no fuss.  Yes the park is under reconstruction but this doesn't affect your stay.  Very quiet and peaceful park. Thank you for a lovely weekend.

Great place to stay while exploring and holidaying in Queensland. Really cheap rates for a caravan site, also for a self contained unit.
Magnesium pool for adults and a large kids pool.
Massive BBQ and kitchen right near the pool.
Awesome safe atmosphere for families holidaying.
Helpful staff and very knowledgeable about the area and adventuring
Grounds were run down and unkept. Stove/cooktop in cabin kitchen was hardly usable. States fully equipped kitchen but didn't provide basic cooking utensils. Overall very disappointed

Crap park, dirty pool, terrible old permanent vans all around with junk everywhere.How they are permitted to trade under the Big 4 banner is so discieving.And I was told the pool gets cleaned every 2 weeks,the day I got in it I had to ask for someone to clean the bird poo out of it.Stay away go somewhere else.I booked 9 nights left after 5.I’m shocked to read some of the reviews saying how great it is.😮

A small campsite where the facilities are getting tired. A big house is being built in the front so expect construction when you are there. This disrupts the entrance drive way and there is some muddy areas that are fenced off, but other than that, does not effect the park. The amenities block is old, but clean. They have washing/dryers that accept cash and new cards, but a number of them were out-of-order. The pool is nice, but lacks any shade. The park is away from the throng of Hervey bay foreshore and there is not a lot in walking distance, so plan for this to be a base you drive out of each day. There is not a lot of sand at the beach at the end of the road, and is mainly rocks, but the cycle path is here and if you have bikes a good starting point.

After a last minute booking due to weather washing out our camp site the staff were very accommodating setting us up in one of there cabins which were great and helping with additional space for our boat, overall great quiet park not over crowded like some of the larger ones and amazing staff, it’s a place we will be happy to come back to again

One of the worst caravan parks in Australia. Bathrooms need major work done. Nobody greeted us on arrival, there was an envelope left with our name on it. Wishing a few hours of setting up our caravan was infested with ants. Works going on in park means it’s a mess and it’s expensive. Would not come back.

I have stayed in this park,for the last 7 days,and found it,very clean,amenities,pool,cooking area,all great,the manager ,Craig,is very helpful,with any inquiries,also they way he explained to me about Fraser Island tours. I booked a tour straight away,and lucky I did,with k'gari tours,excellent day,,I would definitely,stop in again,and recommend this park,to anyone visiting Hervey bay
We had a lovely weekend away. The park has great pool area and very friendly care takers. We will be back

Wir haben 9 Nächte auf diesem Camping Platz verbracht. Wir wurden im Voraus per Mail informiert, dass Umbauarbeiten stattfinden von diesen haben wir nichts bemerkt. Die Sanitäranlagen waren alt jedoch immer sauber. Wir haben den Geburtstag meines Partners auf diesem Camping Platz verbracht auf die Anfrage per Mail für Empfehlungen von Restaurants in der Umgebung kam schnell eine Antwort jedoch auf die Anfrage ob sie für uns einen Tisch und Trasfer buchen können haben wir keine Antwort mehr erhalten auch nicht beim Nachhacken. Schaade. Am Automat mit Snacks und Getränken wollten wir uns ein RedBull gönnen leider funktionierte der Automat nicht. Nach Meldung an der Reception wurde der zuständigen Firma der Defekt gemeldet doch auch die nächsten Tage blieb der Automat defekt und wir bestellten unsere Sachen per Uber Eats. Schaade. Der Pool war eine gute Abkühlung das Wasser nach einigen Tagen jedoch sehr trüb. Die Küche war gut. Das WLAN war sehr gut. Die Lage ist etwas abgelegen und um etwas zu unternehmen muss man sich auf Tagesausflüge einstellen. Jedoch kann man gut auch auf dem Camping Platz ausruhen und die Ruhe geniessen. Wir hatten einen schönen Aufenthalt.

Park was kid friendly- beautiful pool area with all the facilities you need (laundry, toilets showers etc) owners Tom and Alyssa and their family were welcoming and went above and beyond to ensure we had a great holiday. Looking forward to coming back to Big 4 Hervey Bay Holiday Park.

The worst big 4 we've stayed at. Was meant to stay for 6 nights we left after 2 and booked somewhere else.
Owners are building a new house right out front. So looks like a construction site.
Bathrooms/ toilets awful condition. Meant to clean at 830am but no difference after a clean. Nothing for the kids to do. Pool has absolutely no shade, games room closed moved to a different location (tin shed) no fans not ideal for summer.
Camp kitchen dirty, old and unsafe.
I understand its a small big 4 and not a typical one. But the price you pay is the same like you are staying at a normal big 4. Very very disappointing. Will not stay again and do not recommend for children.
Yes 2 minutes away from the beach. Be prepared for alot of day trips as there is NOTHING to do on site.
Old one, they have what you need in basic standard, do not expect Big4 quality.
Friendly  and  helpful staff with great family atmosphere.   Awesome place to stay

Was the first stop of our Xmas break from Melbourne only bad thing for us is we didnt want to leave wish we stayed longer the people in that park were amazing from guests to staff and especially the owners but I think they got sick of us in the end 🤣 Tom Alyssa n all there staff a big thank you for starting our holidays amazingly with your amazing park and socialising we will
Be back !!

Amazing staff, super friendly and helpful! We had a 40ft motorhome that we took on our maiden voyage, they helped us park it in. Our kids had the time of their lives playing each day/night with all the others. Location is great and the renovations they are doing are just going to make it even better. Great campsites and great experiences. The renovations will be a game changer for the place and will bring it up to standards. End of the day it is a campsite not a 5star resort. Highly recommend 🙏🙌
Friendly staff, practical amenities and kept clean. Close to anything you need

Overall experience ok…….. except for one person who spoiled the whole thing. The female cleaner lives on site and literally screams “this is private property, you can’t walk down here !!!!!” when you walk past her site. Now we weren’t walking on the grass but on the road. There are no signs to say it is Private Property and there is nothing on the information when you check in to say it’s Private Property.
The same person is the dog Police and if she sees your dog not under control she yells at you “you have three warnings then you’ll be kicked out.”
She literally stood in front of our site for 10 minutes one morning when she was supposed to be cleaning the toilets as she thought our dog was not tied up, which it was, just waiting for it to run.
Get a life Lady !!!!
Don’t have a pet friendly policy if you’re going to carry on like that.

We spent 10 nights over Christmas and New Year on a powered site. The amenities, staff and facilities were excellent. The activities for kids and adults over the Christmas period were so much fun. We’ll definitely be back!😄

A great experience, from booking, to arrival & checkin, and the stay. Tom was a great assistance guiding me into our site.
The Park is ideally situated for us, which suited our families needs perfectly.
Amenities were older, but kept tidy. A good job considering the weather events, and the school holidays.
Will definitely stay here again during our future visits to the region.

Great location, this is a classic park people need to understand this, staff were wonderful,  polite,  friendly and helpful.   Park was very clean, amenities are old but always kept clean and maintained.  Definitely will come back and stay again thanks for the hospitality 😉
The Holiday Park is kept lovely and clean and the toilets are nice and clean as well

Currently on a week's Holiday here in our caravan and I must say this little park is one of the best we have stayed at. It's only little but the staff are amazing, treasure hunts for the kids, free sausage sizzles, a really warm and Kind Environment.  We will most definitely be back. Shower and Toilets are always spotless. Being alittle further out of town means its so Quiet and  Low Car traffic. Thanks so much to the staff for making us feel so welcome.

Cabins were spacious and clean, very friendly and helpful staff especially Ally ,Tom and Maree ,very family orientated , amazing magnesium  pool to  unwind and cool off, close to shopping ,restaurants and water activities,Turtle feeding and Frazer island was a highlight ,I really  enjoyed my time here and highly recommend this place to relax. I Will definitely come back.

I had a wonderful experience here , the staff were amazing helpful & accommodating, cabins were clean ,modern, pet friendly.
The magnesium pool was amazing and relaxing It was a peaceful environment to stay & unwind. Very family oriented .The free bbq night was great too! ,It’s  a short boat ride to Frazer island , I would highly recommend staying here..
Great location. Clean amenities. Entertainment
Very quiet location is under going repairs to the office. Has many long-term stays. $4 washing machines and dryer. Town just up the road.

Checking in was simple which is always good, top bunk bed has no fall protection and close to a 2m fall so would not recommend letting a child sleep up there. The overall condition of the cabins is very very poor, air conditioning turns on and off, no reception if you're with Optus, active construction site towards the front with electrical box doors unlocked and flapping around in the wind all night, patio screen outside of door is poorly installed and flapping around in the wind all night, lots of questionable workmanship on installs and repairs with the cabins reminds me of a fifo gig. It is not a holiday park at all with much better options in town, I was led to believe it'd be half alright being a BIG4 but it's definitely nothing like the rest of them. Luckily I only stayed here for quick accommodation but just putting this out there in case anyone was going to stay here with their family in the cabins. For a quick place to stay, recommended. For a holiday with your family, absolutely not. Not worth the money it's a very depressing atmosphere.

Staff are very friendly and helpful.   Especially Marie who goes out of her way to help with any problems.   Amenities are clean.    The park is very quiet and in a quiet area.     Short walk to the esplanade and convenience store.
Mooie camping met veel ruimte voor de campers. Schone en mooie wc en douches. Zeer vriendelijk ontvangst en een fijn zwembad. Ook een mooie ruimte om te koken. Zeker een aanrader.

My partner and I have stayed at the caravan park a couple of times now. There cabins are very nice and have recently been refurbished. The staff there are lovely to have a chat with and very easy going and want you to have a great stay.

Great little park very family friendly. Walking distance to the beach, also great bike and walking traces.
Awesome caravan sites with concrete slab with room for your car as well. Tom & Craig will even help you put your van in if needed.
They had a sausage sizzle a couple of times when we were there. Great kitchen, bbq’s,  microwave, fridge, kettle, pots and pans even some crockery. Bit of construction work going on when we were there but will be great when all finished.
We will definitely be back August next year.
Thanks Team
Jan & Greg B

Fantastic location
Great people and room was also great

Service and area was incredible, extremely family orientated. Had a free sausage sizzle and had all families to interact and join in with watching the football and overall making a fantastic experience.

Amenities were extremely clean, gaming area and pool area were incredible and great for children, also for younger children having the heated splash pool.

Honestly can not recommend enough. Thank you for having our family, will be back again soon.

The management of this park is very friendly.  Craig came immediately to help with parking when we arrived.  The park is well maintained and they are expanding.  Craig and his wife held a scavenger hunt for kids in the afternoon and a free sausage sizzle in the evening.  I like his saying "We like you come as guests and leave as friends".
Not up to Big4 standard. Acknowledge it’s an older park but the amenities are very lacking and weren’t maintained. Small park with large number of permanent resident’s.

Cute caravan park away fromt he main drag. Right near the beach. Dog friendly   kid friendly.  Great bike paths into town. Nice walk to the waterfront. Currently undergoing  a face lift but still giid to stay showers and toilets clean and tidy

Well, I'm in the air with this one, hence the 2 stars.  Lovely, friendly owners. But that's where it ends unfortunately. ||I really don't understand how they got the big 4 name, as it isn't what you expect from a big 4. I'm confused in how they operate under the big 4 banner, because it does NOT fair up with the majority of big 4. I guess I had bigger expectations....||The park is undergoing renovations and rebuilds which was horribly noisy throughout the day with the angle grinders, hammering and nail gun etc. Not the piece and tranquillity you expect. I would've appreciated the heads up on arrival.||The park is very small with very narrow roads, and almost everyone struggled parking the vans during our stay. We needed to move our car, so one couple could reverse onto their site that was opposite ours. The amenities and laundry room are very outdated. The laundry only had one working dryer and two working washingmachines, so there was a line up for it, which was inconvenient when we had the day planned out. Anyhow, Denise said they were sick of repairing the other 2 dryers and will be look into replacing them. A little too late for us current visitors. In the bathroom, you are required to mop the shower out when finished showering, which is a first for me (it'd be like a motel telling you to strip the beds before you leave). The toilets have scum build up, which feels dirty. I truly feel they should've concentrated on the amenities before their house and cabin upgrades. Customer satisfaction should have been a priority over a new 2 story home and refurbished cabins sorry.||As we generally free camp everywhere, it wasn't an option in Hervey Bay, so when I googled parks around the area,  I chose the big 4 due to its high reputation of a larger family park. Sadly this was not the case here...  I'm sorry, but I don't see the "exciting new upgrades", that you keep mentioning. I should've read the reviews beforehand.

Well, I'm in the air with this one, hence the 2 stars.  Lovely, friendly owners. But that's where it ends unfortunately.

I really don't understand how they got the big 4 name, as it isn't what you expect from a big 4. I'm confused in how they operate under the big 4 banner, because it does NOT fair up with the majority of big 4. I guess I had bigger expectations....

The park is undergoing renovations and rebuilds which was horribly noisy throughout the day with the angle grinders, hammering and nail gun etc. Not the piece and tranquillity you expect. I would've appreciated the heads up on arrival.

The park is very small with very narrow roads, and almost everyone struggled parking the vans during our stay. We needed to move our car, so one couple could reverse onto their site that was opposite ours. The amenities and laundry room are very outdated. The laundry only had one working dryer and two working washingmachines, so there was a line up for it, which was inconvenient when we had the day planned out. Anyhow, Denise said they were sick of repairing the other 2 dryers and will be look into replacing them. A little too late for us current visitors. In the bathroom, you are required to mop the shower out when finished showering, which is a first for me (it'd be like a motel telling you to strip the beds before you leave). The toilets have scum build up, which feels dirty. I truly feel they should've concentrated on the amenities before their house and cabin upgrades. Customer satisfaction should have been a priority over a new 2 story home and refurbished cabins sorry.

As we generally free camp everywhere, it wasn't an option in Hervey Bay, so when I googled parks around the area,  I chose the big 4 due to its high reputation of a larger family park. Sadly this was not the case here...  I'm sorry, but I don't see the "exciting new upgrades", that you keep mentioning. I should've read the reviews beforehand.

Loved our 3 night stay. Quiet location. Only a short drive to Harvey Bay CBD. 5 minute walk to beautiful ocean views. Sites are good.
Amenities are a little dated, however very clean.
Craig is so helpful with any assistance required for novice caravaners.
Pool, deck area, and covered BBQ area are well maintained.
Permanent residence are welcoming.
The young owners, Alysha and Tom are focused on updating this lovely family friendly park. Look forward to our return trip.

Point Vernon Big 4 Holiday Park is perfect for campers looking for a quite location.  Easy walk to view the headland/ocean. Only a short drive into Harvey Bay CBD. Amenities are older style however kept very clean. Lovely pool and deck, with a good BBQ area. Craig has a great personality and is very accomodating with any assistance required. The park owners, Alysha and Tom have started more upgrades to this lovely family friendly park. Look forward to our next stay.

Unfortunately we stayed during renovations where numerous advertised activities weren’t available.

These activities made it a standout for us so without them was just another caravan park.
Looks to being refurbished. Heading in the right direction. Ammenities need updating. Nice caravan park
Probably should be the last caravan park you choose in Hervey Bay. Very tired park with what seems to be full time residents. Has a trailer park vibe to it.

Interestingly they use what’s called “dynamic pricing” which means that they can charge whatever they like. Despite the website saying from $63 per powered site per night (for members), we were charged $85 ($95 non-members). We were expecting something special for those prices. The site turned out to be a quagmire and you sank in the mud going to the amenities. As for the amenities they are clean but just about the worst we’ve ever seen. Freezing cold as there is no main door to the entrance and holes in the wall with mesh screen for a cubicle window. Can’t believe they are a part of the Big 4 group. Having said all that the reception staff were friendly but we’d never stay there again.

We would like to thank Craig & staff for being so accommodating.
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay in this friendly park. You guys do a great job.
We  can’t wait to see the new works and renovations on our next visit.

We had a powered site and booked for a fortnight. We left after a week. The amenities are old, inadequate when compared to other parks, and dirty. Our site was littered with rubbish from previous occupants. There are a lot of permanent guests.

Wish I could do 0 star..
Absolutely horrible experience,  do not waste your money here.

I’ve stayed at plenty of Big 4 caravan parks all across Australia, and they’ve all been great. This one? Nothing like any of them. It doesn’t deserve the Big 4 name, and honestly, I’m shocked it’s even allowed to operate under that banner.

The cabin floor was disgusting, clearly not cleaned properly. The bedding was awful, the pillows were flat, the mattresses felt like sleeping on a slab of concrete. The two single beds had nothing but a sheet. The shower ran out of hot water after 20 minutes, which is useless if you’re travelling with a family. (This particular cabin slept 4.)

Two of the windows in our cabin had no blinds or curtains at all. And although the kitchen window was frosted, it let in a ridiculous amount of light from the cabin next door, especially their outdoor light, which shone directly over the bed and into our eyes while we were trying to sleep.

The games room was completely run down.. you had to go to reception just to get a ping pong ball, and the pool cues weren’t there unless you paid to borrow them. The so-called “heated pool” was colder than the cold one, not heated at all.

To top it off, there were grumpy permanent residents who verbally abused children AND an off duty female staff member (Denise) who yelled at the kids and threatened to take their balls and throw them away just because they were playing near their cabin. Completely inappropriate and disgusting behaviour in a supposed “family-friendly” park.

Overall, this was a horrible experience. Dirty, unfriendly, poorly managed, and totally disappointing. We couldn’t wait to leave.
Don’t take your kids here.

Do yourself a favour, book literally anywhere else.
(Below is photo of how bright the room is without the blind.)
Thank you so much for having us ,doing park up ,starting to look good rob Echuca

This is a great little park.  The management were very helpful during our stay. Even a sausage sizzle put on for the travellers.  Yes is an old park and under going reservations but does not take away how serene it is. We looked at several reviews on Google before we booked and considered them unjust. Well gone to all the staff. We will be back. 😀👍

We had 3 nights here. Positives were that there is a great camp kitchen that is clean and the amenities blocks while fairly old were very clean as well. As others have mentioned this park has more of a permanent feel with a few grumpy longer term residents and not a lot of room.

The location was the let down for us, being a big4 member I didn't research the other parks but looking back wish I had as there are at least 3 on the waterfront that look a bit more modern and are closer to shops/cafes with beach front views as well.

Loved our stay at Big 4 Hervey Bay! Such an incredible place for families. The pool was beautiful, facilities were clean and comfortable and everyone was warm and welcoming. Highly recommend this Big 4! Perfect distance from town to be quiet but still close enough to see and do everything!

what an amazing place! Such friendly hosts. Craig and DiDi made us feel right at home Home… We came as guests and left as friends for life. So great for the kids, they regularly put on really interesting and thought-provoking activities for the kids. Sweet Pool. don't bother going an extra five minutes closer to town this place is way better. Games room with arcade games, ping-pong etc… The best! ❤️
It is a great place for a holiday, love the pier caravan park.
Ver friendly staff, nice quiet but central location. Could have stayed longer but needed to head north.

Park was not enjoyable, bandaids in one of the men’s showers and tea towel in the other. No facilities not close to shops or cafes. Not sure how they secured the big 4 name this park is no we’re near the standard you would expect.
We stayed in our van on the waterfront. We had a water view. The amenities were clean, and the park was very well maintained.
Had a great time, accom topnotch. Great locale and Craig and staff friendly and informative.  Good luck with patk upgrades. Definitely be back.

Great caravan park. The staff were amazing friendly and went out of their way to make sure we enjoyed our stay plus put on free fun activities for the kids.
The location was also great. A few hundred meters to the left was a convenience shop that cooks food and a few hundred meters the other direction is the beach. Although it's not the best beach (a bit rocky) it offers shade in the afternoon. Imagine the idea of being at the beach with shade from trees.
The cabin we stayed in was comfortable and perfect for our needs.
We will definitely be going back to Big 4 Hervey Bay and recommend it to event else.
Thanks so much for having us

Craig assisted with the selection of sites and parking assist to ensure the optimal use of each site.  There was not a day go by during our week stay that one of the staff didn’t drop buy to ask us how our stay was going as if if there was any thing we need help with.  On top of the services provided and community events such as free Easter egg hunt for the kids, free sausage sizzle, free bacon and egg breakfast along with providing a pizza van one night a week and coffee van in the mornings the first concerns were soon forgotten.. Alysha what you and the team have provided in a quite well maintained park is amazing.  What you are planning will be spectacular.  We wish you the best with your developments and recommend you and your park to any campers looking for a peaceful trouble free stay and Craig is not all that bad either.  Thx

Just a short drive into the main town these guys really put together a great stay for our families! Had a great Caravan stay here.  Craig was great to guide you directly where you had to go with the van for an easy manoeuvre and no spousal blews !!
The park was very full but room for everyone.  Showers are awesome and facilities very clean.  Anzac morning Breakfast supplied by the park was unreal !!  Thanks again and we would definitely stay again and recommend to anyone.

This is awesome, the location is quiet, great for dogs, staff are super friendly, very helpful and they always put on a great Easter egg hunt for the little ones. Do yourself a favor and stay here for a great little vacay... 😉

We had such a wonderful stay at this caravan park! From the moment we arrived, we were greeted with warm smiles from the staff who went out of their way to make us feel welcome. The whole park has a lovely, peaceful atmosphere—ideal for families looking to relax and unwind.

The sites are clean, well-maintained, and spacious enough for the kids to play safely. It was so nice to be able to let them explore without worrying. We especially appreciated how quiet the evenings were—perfect for a restful night after a fun day out.

The facilities were spotless, and everything we needed was close by. It’s clear the staff take great pride in keeping the park in top shape. We’ll definitely be back, and we highly recommend it to anyone looking for a quiet, family-friendly spot with genuinely friendly service!

We were greated by the friendly groundperson when we arrived and everyone that works there were friendly and amazing. Toilets and showers were clean.

Lovely Moter Camp to stay at.

I fully recommend this camp as family friendly and in a great location near the beach.

We recently had a big family get together weekend.  Rooms were very clean and the park was well played out, good swimming pool too.  The communal kitchen was well positioned near the pool and the children's playground.   This Big4 is highly recommended.
Very friendly and accomodating. Made us feel welcome

We have had  a beautiful holiday here . so relaxing i highly recommend coming and stying every one here was so friendly we will definitely be coming back 😀thank you for having us big 4 :) see you all again

If you have trouble reversing, then you can ask the staff to help you.   Our site was a drive-through, but the road was narrow, so I had difficulty lining up the van with the slab. Maybe I  should have backed it in. 300M to the bay. There is a small beach there if you want a swim. Quiet park and quiet area. Away from the hussle and bussle of the central beach area. One of the permanents had a blew with the staff. A few hours later he left. Hopefully kicked out. The other permanents seemed happy with this result. Popular coffee shop around the corner. 2 min drive or 10 min walk. I had no issues therefore 5 ⭐️

Friendly staff and informative, they go out of their way to make sure we are happy with everything.

I would definitely recommend them for your next get away holiday.
Maz
Feb 2025

We had a fantastic stay at BIG4 Hervey Bay! The magnesium pool was a highlight. Our powered slab site was spacious and well-maintained, making setup a breeze. The park is super kid-friendly, with plenty of space and activities to keep the little ones entertained. To top it off, the owners were absolutely lovely, welcoming and always happy to help. Highly recommend for families and anyone looking for a comfortable, well-run holiday park! We’ll definitely be back.

We stayed 4 nights on a powered site. The grounds are kept tidy, mowed after guests leave. The table tennis table in the kids zone is popular, as is the pool which was crystal clear, with new bean lounges to relax in.
This is a small caravan park by most standards of Big 4 parks, with many permanent mobile homes and several caravan dwellers that appear to be long term, mostly grouped together to the west of the park. The powered short term sites are also grouped together.
The amenities block was clean but dated. I'm sure it is on the To Do List.
Located one block back from the water, it is a pleasant walk via a wide footpath.
There is a convenience store about 150m away.
On Saturday morning cheerful staff advised that a coffee cart had arrived at the entrance to the park. Nice!
The supermarkets are about 5km away.
This park is peacefully quiet mid week and the bay breeze was welcomed.
Thanks for your hospitality Tom & Alysha at Big4 Hervey Bay

The caravan park is relatively quiet and nice, located about 12 minutes from the centre of town. There’s a lot of permanent sites and a few nicely grassed van spots with concrete slabs. It’s family friendly with a small playground and nice pool area. The pool needs some shade cloths over it as it’s too hot throughout most of the day. The biggest let down was the cold dirty showers the first night and the next morning (7am). Not sure if something happened to the hot water heater because there was hot water on Saturday night. The toilets and showers are not very clean with the grout and tiles looking very dirty and mouldy. Could do with a good grout scrub. There was also clumps of hair in the drains for two days and no toilet paper in two of the toilets. There’s quite a few cob webs which aren’t hard to get with a broom. We saw them clean the amenities Saturday morning so not sure how thorough they were. The gaming area was nice but no pool cues so I’m assuming someone stole them. It’s also very hot in the shed where the games are and they only had two of the smaller Aircons on. They might need to use the bigger ones. I think if they have the bathrooms a bit of a spruce up/clean the place wouldn’t be too bad.

worst campground ever. In the Front is a big construction Site.
stayed for one night. 1 of 3 showers Out of order, later at night there was a Gas problem or Something and IT was Just cold water available. 2 of 3 washer Out of order. kitchen and Toilet Not very Clean and very old everything. Lots of permanent residents on the ground, very small campground. Pool was OK. you are far away from the Sandy beach..there are Just Stones.
We Had a Look around for other campgrounds. They were all cheaper than the big 4 and looked nicer. Take the discovery Park, ITS the best around there.

Beautiful spot friendly staff, Tom and Alysha were awesome pleasure meeting.
definitely be back!

The caravan park in Point Vernon is an absolute gem, offering a peaceful and serene atmosphere that feels like a true escape from the hustle and bustle. Surrounded by beautiful natural scenery and just a stone’s throw from the water, it’s the perfect place to relax and recharge. The park is impeccably maintained, with clean facilities, spacious sites, and plenty of shaded areas to keep things comfortable. The staff are incredibly welcoming and go out of their way to ensure every guest feels right at home. Whether you’re enjoying a quiet stroll along the nearby beachfront or simply soaking in the tranquil surroundings, this park truly stands out as a wonderful place to stay.

I recently stayed at this Caravan Park in Point Vernon, and it was an absolutely fantastic experience! The location is perfect – peaceful and scenic, with easy access to the beautiful waterfront. The grounds are well-maintained, offering spacious, shady sites ideal for caravans, tents, or motorhomes.

The amenities were spotless and regularly cleaned, which made the stay even more comfortable. The staff were incredibly friendly and went out of their way to ensure we had everything we needed. Whether it was recommending local attractions or providing assistance, their customer service was top-notch.

One of the highlights was the proximity to Hervey Bay – perfect for whale watching and exploring the Fraser Coast. The park also has a great family-friendly vibe, with facilities like BBQ areas, a playground for the kids, and plenty of room to relax and unwind.

I would highly recommend this caravan park to anyone looking for a relaxing, affordable getaway in Point Vernon. We’ll definitely be back!

Clean and tidy park with great kitchen facilities , toilet block a bit dated .

Way to far to walk to main shops but does have a small convenience store within 400 mts , bus stop outside the gate .
This Big4 is a very small compact camp not like any other Big4 we have stayed at but still nice .

I will definitely stay here again and will recommend to everyone.

Stayed in our caravan. Booking in process is so quick and easy.  Free wifi, no pw required. Grest pool area, close to everything and despite school holidays,  quiet.

Big 4 Hervey Bay Caravan Park is where we always stay when visiting Hervey Bay. The staff are friendly and always there to help. We are frequent visitor to this caravan park. The pool area and gaming room are great to entertain kids.

This park is by far THE BEST we have stayed in and we’ve stayed in plenty having been on the road for the last 3.5 years.

From the moment I called up to book in, to arriving and then of course staying, we have been made to feel welcomed, and it feels like we are home. The team are amazing!!!

The games room is so cozy and inviting. Like a rec/chill room…. It’s not filled with loud and bright machines designed to take your money, there’s a soccer table, table tennis, kids toys/books/games, old retro arcade machines and a PlayStation, all for free!

Honestly, I am blown away by this park, it’s at the top of my list and more than likely will remain there.

If you’re after no frills, a passionate team who go above and beyond, come stay here!

Had a week here very recently and found the staff very helpful and friendly. Amenities were kept very clean and sanitised. Fairly quiet area.
Lovely place.. friendly staff, very quiet location. Bit tight in some places for vans. Cars and vans bigger these days  most places have not adjusted accordingly.

I found this caravan park to be horrible , staff were so loud and had no respect for guests . Toilet block very outdated and old . I would not recommend to our family and friends to stay here at all . Infant we left a night early as our experience was horrible . What a rip off at $74 a night . Terrible place do not stay here . We were placed in the first site with two dogs ! Not ideal . A refund would be appreciated it was horrible
What a great friendly crew at this park and staff even assisting with van parking to take out the stress. Nil issues and very quiet along with being clean

We had a fantastic week at the Big 4 in Hervey Bay! After a hectic 6 weeks of travelling up the east coast (and staying at the Big 4 in Caloundra in school holidays surrounded by hundreds of kids) we really needed to relax and this place was perfect! It’s a smaller park but has everything you need, and very dog friendly!  We stayed on a powered site and swam in the pool nearly every day! The beach is just up the road and the sunrises are AMAZING!
The best thing about the park is the owners and staff! We were invited to their Saturday night sausage sizzle (free) and met some really lovely people, and it kind of felt like a home away from home! Thank you Tom and Alysha!
Excelent campsite, handy to all the attractions in Harvey Bay and the nearby tourist attractions. Facilities kept clean and well maintained. Would recommend to anyone. Cheers Gordon and Karen

The site allocates to us is not fit for a caravan after rain. It should not be made available during wet times. Other sites I am sure were fine. The sullage drain was blocked which created a “bog” around the car making it very inconvenient and messy getting to and from the van. Staff were nice and helpful.

Tucked away in a quiet area of Hervey Bay is this delightful gem 💎.  Yet not far from the water views. I travelled with my grand daughter and she had a wonderful time hanging out with the children at the playground and well appointed kids play room. Because of its smaller size I was able I was able to locate my grand daughter at all times. We had a great time. Everyone was really  friendly. Thanks for making our Granny camp memorable. 🏕.

Absolutely loved our time here, as newbie’s we were welcomed and helped above and beyond. Family friendly with plenty for the kids to do, state of origin night was awesome, hosts put on a huge platter, game on the big screen, all the guests were invited and joined in .. great atmosphere 👍
Amenities were always clean and plenty of hot water, easy walk to stunning beachfront, dog friendly and off leash.. we are most definitely coming back 10/10

Small, clean and pleasant caravan park with very friendly staff. Good amenities and camp kitchen with weekly events, like a sausage sizzle.
A little far to walk to the main drag but great for pushbikes. Less than 10 minutes drive to  beachfront esplanades, restaurants, shops, and nearby marina.

I honestly feel the thing that makes this park is the park manager / grounds manager. ||He’s so welcoming and it’s genuine! He is super accommodating, and very positive!||The games room is a bonus for colder days, there is a PlayStation in there so it’s tricky to get the kids off, but it also gives us peace and quiet when needed, too.||A whole bunch of intact, well cared for quality books and toys the younger kids and our baby loves!! Table tennis and soccer table.||All free.||Clean room unlike some other holiday parks we’ve stayed at. ||The monitors are always clean, waters always hot, pressure is good. Lots of space!||The playground is fair, our baby loves it, but likely only suitable for the toddlers, or preschool age.  Still all in good condition.||We would 100 percent make this our go to holiday park in Hervey Bay.

Very friendly owners and brilliant location. Great facilities.
I would recommend this caravan park to one and all.

Enjoyed our three nights here. Staff were super helpful and friendly on arrival. Amenities kept clean. Nice bbq camp kitchen area. Big TV perfect for watching Freo Dockers. Grassy powered van site. Dog friendly and short walk to off leash dog beach and long grassed walk area toward town.
Great staff clean and comfortable cabins and just an unbelievable place to stay at ,great for kids just an unreal place thanks to you all ,we will be back soon thanks Paul and Michelle

Very warm welcome from Craig and great assistance from Tom to park the van.  Very nice park with great potential.   The pool area is very good, as is the camp kitchen.   There is plenty of water pressure for the shower.  Bit further out of town, which makes for a very quiet park.  Great conversations with Tom each day.  Will be back.
We had mid week stay van site our second time very well looked after park staff are very friendly and helpful

Highly Recommended!!!
Great place to stay!

BIG4 Hervey Bay is located in a beautiful spot and meets all our needs for site camping in our rooftop tent. We’ve also stayed in their onsite cabins which are very tidy and clean. The staff are friendly and always go out of their way to make sure you have what you need. There’s also a newly renovated magnesium pool located at the front of the park that is a great way to cool off. Overall the park has great character with a dedicated team to further the development into the future.

Our caravan spot was at the entrance and exit. It was noisy with all cars, trucks and vans passing by.

It was extremely tight parking our ute with palm trees in the way.

No sullery was provided, so everyone's greywater was all over the lawn and road.  (Always muddy)
Both pools were cold, no heated water in the kids pool as advertised.

Other than noisy bats and bat poo residue on the ute and van, the campsite was always clean.

Lovely quiet campground, seemed to be mostly older couples which suited us and meant it was very friendly and peaceful. Very helpful management. Excellent showers. Definitely recommend if you want to be away from the busy waterfront parks in Hervey Bay. We would certainly stay again.
Couldn’t accommodate us due to size of our caravan being too big at 25ft

Good location just out of town.
Friendly people.
Glad I had own shower & toilet. Pretty tired for a Big 4 park
I think its a work in progress.
I hope they get the park to the standard they are after.

Made a last minute decision to visit my daughter in Hervey Bay, stayed at the Big 4 Point Vernon in a cabin.
The cabin was super clean with everything working, the pool looked awesome the grounds very tidy and staff were so friendly and accommodating, nothing was a problem.
I was told under new management and park upgrades were progressing, well the new management in my eyes are going great.
Many thanks and I will be back again.
Cheers, Shane

John and Cheryl Copley from North Brisbane, had a relaxing stay there at the Big 4 - Point Vernon.
We are members and found the park to be very welcoming & also quiet which suited us, just fine.
Friendly, tidy and amenities were always clean.
Thank you for fitting us in and we both look forward to visiting again.
Cheers John and Cheryl
Great clean park. Smallish sites but been in worse. Guided onto your site by manager. Bit far out of town to walk in

Pulled in after a long drive and were helped to our site and to park our oversized van!! Quiet but friendly site, super clean amenities. Bit of a trek out for dinner but the free RSL shuttle bus did the job perfectly!!
Lovely friendly staff. Very helpful.
The new owners are very helpful the site's are not that big the amenities are very clean

Tom was extremely helpful with assisting us into our caravan site. The park has lots of potential.
Seemed to be a lot of people living there.
A lot of people smoking.
The park is a long walk from anywhere.
The pool was lovely and the amenities were clean.
No codes or keys which made things simple.

Stayed here in a powered van site was late arriving to be met by a young man who helped reverse  us in as it was a bit tight and busy long weekend everywhere was clean and tidy and the  pool was  very inviting would definitely stay again
New managers who are very helpful and friendly. Park probably needs a little money spent on it to get it up to scratch. Other than that happy.
Great friendly service. Peacefully location, clean amenities and great value
We had a powered site. Sites kept maintained.  Great hosts. Facilities well maintained and clean. Would definitely stay there again.

Gorgeous caravan park. Van sires are good. Well appointed. Good facilities, great bush walk access directly to the beach, lots of trees and wildlife walking around.  Owners are friendly. Definitely would recommend.  Great part of town with lots to do.
Beautiful caravan park. Lovely pool and playground for the kids, and friendly guests. Very close to everything.

Great location, amazing friendly and helpful staff.
We took the Fraser k’gari explorer tours and picked us up right out front of the Big 4.

I stayed here recently for 3 nights with my two children for the Easter school holidays. We all had a great time - the kids swam in the pool every day and enjoyed the games room. The park is quiet and relaxed, lovely place to stay as a family. Easy walk to the beach and a short drive to the Wetside water park and restaurants, shops etc. It is actually the perfect distance away from all the hustle and bustle so you can really get into relaxed holiday mode without hoards of other holiday people around you. I have read some people in other camping grounds have had issues with crime but had none of that at the big4 Hervey Bay. Amenities were clean and grounds are immaculate, staff were super friendly. We stayed in a cabin and it had everything we needed - linen, plump pillows, two tvs, all the kitchen equipment needed, aircon worked well. The only thing my kids wished it had was a sofa, but I'm not sure how you'd fit that in the cabin and besides - those lazybutts needed to be outside and swimming or riding their bikes anyway 😜
Things we did: walked to the beach, ice cream at planet 72, wetside water park, lunches out, visited several playgrounds, walked the uranguan pier and visited the markets there. There's lots to do at HB and we'll be back for sure!

We stayed at the big 4 Hervey Bay over Easter 2024 and we were incredibly disappointed.

We booked a pet friendly cabin that slept 4, online the photos show an updated cabin with a seperate sleeping and eating areas that could be closed by doors. When we arrived we did not receive this cabin, we received an old, dirty cabin with no sections for eating and sleeping.

On the first night we arrived the kids beds sheets were dirty (hadn’t been changed just remade), the floors were filthy and the bathroom doors didnt work properly. I called the after hours number which was disconnected so walked to the office, I did find a member of staff and they came and changed the sheets and offered to mop the floors. (The staff were friendly and accomodating)

The next morning the staff came and mopped the floors but sadly we think the floors need a desperate scrub or to be ripped up and new fresh flooring laid. (Attached are photos of our feet after one night walking around, no we didn’t walk barefoot outside and had shoes on beforehand)

The next day I spoke to the owner and he offered a partial (one night refund) for the issues.

However, he stated that it’s the Big 4 who run the website and it’s their job to update the photos in regards to the cabins. This is not on at all and straight up false advertising, we did NOT receive the room we booked and payed for.

We payed a lot of money for what we thought would be a nice place but unfortunately it really ruined our holiday. We left 2 days early as we couldn’t stay in the cabin anymore as it was nothing as advertised and did not suit our needs. (We did receive a refund for those nights)

The park itself is in need of upgrades and I was told management are doing them.

We just want to make sure no one else books here thinking they’ll get the cabins that are in the photos on the website as we did and not receive what was expected.

Hopefully they can improve the park, update the website with correct information and reconnect the after hours number.

Thank you
Chelsea
The park and camp sites are well kept with friendly staff and amenities are clean . We really enjoyed our stay.

We stayed here for 4 nights over Easter in our 9m caravan.   To say the sites are small is an understatement. They are too close to each other and we were in site 58. So so close to the neighbours that we could hear what they were saying.  It is the worst BIG4 we have stayed at. If you’re looking for a park that is nicely done don’t go here. Won’t be back

I recently visited this wonderful park and had an amazing experience with the staff and the overall atmosphere. From the moment we arrived, we were greeted by friendly and welcoming staff who made us feel right at home.

The park itself was well-maintained and organized, with plenty of fun activities for the kids to enjoy. The staff went above and beyond to ensure that everyone had a great time, and it was clear that they truly cared about the guests' experience.

One of the highlights of our visit was the stunning bay just down the road from the park. The views were absolutely breathtaking and we were able to enjoy a relaxing day by the water. The location of the park is truly unbeatable.

I was also impressed by the new owners of the park who are clearly making improvements and taking great care of the property. The gardens were looking beautiful and added to the overall charm of the park.

Overall, I highly recommend this park to anyone looking for a great family-friendly vacation spot. The combination of a stunning bay, organized fun activities, and a friendly and welcoming staff make it the perfect destination. I can't wait to visit again and see what other improvements the new owners have made. Keep up the great work!
Beautiful staff & great accommodation. The pool, play-ground & BBQ is excellent. 100m walk to the beach & the corner store.
We had a ball! Great staff, good energy from all, felt safe and was a nice family experience. Beach close-by and great bike tracks into Hervey Bay town.

My husband, myself and our little dog were in an unfortunate situation whereby the expected settlement date of our new house was put off for a week by the sellers solicitors.  Big 4 were amazing ... at no notice, we were able to put our van on a powered site with water for the week, and my son who had come to H.Bay to help us with the move was able to put his van very close to us. This park offers the lot, everything is immaculately clean, dog friendly, close to beaches, shops, very tourist friendly. Amazing people own and run this park. Absolutely recommend it. 👌
Had a great stay at BIG4 Harvey Bay, park was clean and tidy and the new pool was a hit, will definitely stay again.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay in the cabin.  Point Vernon is a beautiful location and was perfect for our visit to Hervey Bay.  The cabin was perfect for our needs, clean and tidy and the staff at the park were nice and friendly.  We will definitely stay again next time.
Was a 5 min walk to the beach has a good walking /riding track  we enjoyed our stay here
Off the main drag so no road noise. Feels safe because the park is enclosed amongst suburban houses, with a small street frontage. Nice pool, great shower stalls and good kitchen.

Had an amazing experience, team is 10/10.
Very friendly and they even helped choose the best fraser island tour! Will come back again!

Small campsite, we stayed in a cabin that was clean and tidy, they had a pool, little entertainment room for the kids so kids had fun. They allowed dogs, reason why we booked, however T&C required that our dog had to stay in the cabin at all time and was not allowed for a walk around the park, even accompanied, which was disappointing. Otherwise it’s a nice place for its location.

Clean, quiet park with helpful staff. Located short walk from a less populous  stretch of the bay.
One of the most pleasant parks we have visited in 8 years of continuous travel.

Thank you Tom and Alysha,
Rob and I had the best time staying with you, during Xmas 2023 and the new year 2024.
We appreciate your kindness and help during this time.
We Love the Park and all staff.
Especially Craig and Dea who went above and beyond with their interaction, made us feel comfortable, informative as what was happening.
Thank you again Tom and Alysha, your little family are just Beautiful,  great to see your family growing.
We wish you all the best and hope Business will continue to excel in 2024.
Kind regards Angela and Rob x

I have been to a lot of the Big4 parks. I belong to the Big 4 club. It's a quite park in a great location but it's an outdated park. The only thing there is the pool and a small playground for the kids. Big 4 It's time to do an update of this facility.
A bit far out of the main hustle and bustle and a bit dated, but it was lovely and quiet and had basic but good facilities
Clean n tidy  place amenities  are in good order and decent size
Very Friendly staffs. Very helpful.
We have just visited with our camper for 3 nights in January 2024 and we’re very impressed. Lovely small site, friendly people and great facilities. Short drive to the local beach too.

The staff at this big 4 couldn't do enough for me and my family.
They were flexible, understanding,  knowledgeable  and patient with us.
I cannot recommend this sight and the staff enough.
A big thank you,  hoping to return again.

This caravan park is nothing like any other Big 4 that I've stayed at. It's small and old. The amenities need a revamp.
The swimming pool is small and there's no supervision. We had to put up with kids running around it, and in the water throwing toy aeroplanes, using water pistols and generally being a nuisance. Very little shade as well
Trying to get transport from the park to anywhere else in Hervey Bay was a very costly exercise. There is the 'Bus on Demand' service but it'll basically only drop you off at the shopping centre.
I will never stay at the park again.
My family and I all stayed just after xmas for a week and had a fantastic time . Staff are friendly and make you feel at home from the minute you turn up .

Great park, good upgrades being done and lovely owners.
We had a great stay with our young family.

We stayed here for over 3 weeks on a powered site and had a great time. The new owners have put a lot of effort into updating the park and it really shows. Spacious sites, updated pool and friendly staff to deal with. Our family enjoyed our whole stay and if we’re in the area would stay again.

My family and I had the pleasure of camping at big4 Point vernon these Xmas holidays for 2 weeks. And we can say that we had the best time. Tom and his family and all the staff make you feel so welcome and are so accommodating and are constantly checking in with you to see how things are going. We where lucky to have met such lovely people and all the holiday makers where so friendly. We would diffidently recommend anyone wanting to holiday in such a great place, they not only have great facilities but they included the kids and adults in fun games/activities over the holidays. So thank you big4 we will be back again.

A lovely place to stay, friendly helpful staff even New Year’s Eve activities. Great location out of the hustle but still close to everything 10 minutes drive to the Main Street and only a 5 minute walk to the bay views. And a bonus of a early check in was very kind Thanks for having us 😊

Wicked place nice and quiet staff were friendly toilets clean kitchen area clean great place for the kids having the gaming room and kids pool  perfect location being so close to the beach highly recommend and will be back for sure

We enjoyed our stay. The Park and the managers are friendly and go out of their way to make sure people are happy and are having a great time.
We had trouble with the acc in our caravan, but they helped finding the missing part in town and made room for us to stay a bit longer until our acc was fixed.
We would definately stay here again, if we ever return to this area again.
We called after hours to see if there was any availability at late notice. Owners were extremely helpful and went out of their way to open up the reception to check us in. Great facilities.
Clean pool and nice cabins

Very bad located, the pool is dirty and the toilets too. If you have to choose a camping near to the ferry to reach fraser this one is not the good one. Very expensive for what it is, it should not be under the big4 standards.... to avoid... there is a nicer camping near to the sea with better accommodations.

Belle place a cote de la plage
Plein de kangourous dans le camping
Owners & staff are very friendly & hospitable. Park is very clean & tidy & a nice size.  As it's in a residential area it's also nice & quiet.
Great little caravan Park out of the way you can walk to the beach but you have to drive to the shops but it's not a problem we took our caravan and our dog very pet friendly.

Lovely clean cabin with everything I needed, quiet surroundings and close to the beach. Perfect place for a get away and I will be back. Was very impressed when I booked in and I was asked if I would be okay getting up and down steps as I have a walking stick. Will definitely be back.
Close to the esplanade for walking and a dog off leash beach. Cafe nearby. Friendly staff, big thankyou to Tom for his help with flat tyre.
Lovely small, tidy and quiet park. The staff are amazing and so friendly.  Would stay here again, as it's so peaceful and friendly.  Thankyou for making me and my dog feel welcome.
Cabin we stayed in smelled of mould..mould in shower..boring park too far from anywhere in the bay..don't know how it's a big4..
Perfect place to stay
We enjoyed our stay.freindly staff. Great amenities

The park is small and quiet but has more than enough to keep kids busy. The games room has lots of free arcade and computer games plus pingpong table to enjoy. Pool was great to have a splash in. Amenities was tidy. Dog friendly with beach down the road for nice long walks.
Young couple wanting to do well - be kind- they are still learning. Grounds in need, neighbours of the property smoking drifting into the park - can't do much about that.
tiny but ok for one night
Excellent staff and freindly

Not a bad little park.  Nic and quiet but the cleaning of the amenities is very poor.  Went in after cleaner and looked no different.  Toilet paper on floor.  Toothpaste splashed on mirror had been there for the 3 nights we stayed.  Old bar of soap in corner of shower also there the whole time.
Mould in between tiles in shower and in corners of floor.
Could easily be cleand with Exit Mould and a scrubbing brush.  Definitely not Big 4 standards.
Good old fashion camp site….great location
Nice park. Quiet!
Great park with spacious sites and good amenities. Always had hot shower and everything was clean and tidy.
Very friendly  helpful  and clean

Our little family of 3, 2 humans and a dog stayed at this park in our motorhome for 3 months awaiting a house build.  It was incredibly friendly and all staff were fabulous to deal with and very obliging.   Facilities were clean and well located.  For dog and human walks this was wonderful and within easy distance of off leash areas.
In addition the park is an easy drive to supermarkets and for emergency supplies a little store 200m away.  Scores a 10 out of 10 from us and a happy woof from Poppy.
Difficult to park van, but it was well maintained and clean. Shower was fabulous 👌 toilets clean.

Awesome camping ground for your Campervan and awesome staff as well. We only wanted to stay for one night but on their website it stated 2 nights minimum, so we called and the caretaker/ manager was very friendly and directly booked us in for the requested night. 37 AUD for a powered concrete site. We even received an additional 10% discount as our Campervan is a rental (some special promotion which you wouldn’t get when booking online). The campsite offers nice hot showers, really good laundry and dryer for 4 $ each and a nice equipped camp kitchen.
The friendly manager helped us as well with some local information which we’re highly appreciated.
Thanks for everything!
